NICU Dose Helper

Fast medicine maths, with the assumptions left visible.

Prototype calculator for bedside double-checking. This does not replace the drug chart, consultant instructions, pharmacy guidance, renal dosing review, or independent nurse check.

Loaded now

Cefotaxime

500 mg vial • default local concentration 250 mg/mL

Inputs

Patient + prep

Severity
Safety stop: Volume is shown without automatic rounding. Follow local policy for rounding, dilution, route, and final administration volume.

Calculation audit

Enter weight to calculate.

The concentration field stays visible so the assumption can be checked.

-

Local sheet

Reference loaded into this prototype

Important note

This prototype is intentionally limited to the details visible in your uploaded cefotaxime card. External product labels and formularies can show different preparation concentrations, so this app keeps concentration editable and should be validated against your unit guideline before clinical use.
